summary: Tested BLOCK-314 visualViewport mobile keyboard fix for DM thread. The core visualViewport fix is WORKING correctly - dm-thread container uses dynamic pixel height from visualViewport.height and adjusts when viewport resizes. However, discovered a SEPARATE bug: mobile bottom nav bar overlaps dm-input field on mobile.

ui_bugs.issue: Mobile bottom nav bar (h-16/64px, z-100) overlaps and covers the dm-input field. Input is at y=788 on 844px viewport but mobile-bottom-nav is fixed at bottom-0, making input inaccessible.
ui_bugs.fix_suggestion: Add bottom padding to dm-thread (pb-20 or ~80px on mobile) OR hide mobile-bottom-nav when on /messages page with active thread

visualViewport_fix_working.details: dm-thread uses dynamic pixel height from visualViewport (style='height: 844px;' on mobile, style='height: 1080px;' on desktop)

viewport_resize_handling.details: When viewport height changes (844px -> 524px simulating keyboard), dm-thread height adjusts from 844px to 524px (320px reduction)

messages_inbox_loads.details: dm-inbox container loads correctly with Messages heading and empty state

dm_thread_via_deeplink.details: Deep-link /messages?to={userId} correctly opens new conversation thread

dm_input_visible.details: dm-input is within viewport bounds (y=788, bottom=824px on 844px viewport) BUT is covered by mobile-bottom-nav fixed element

dm_input_clickable.details: Click intercepted by mobile-bottom-nav overlay - '<a href="/collection"> from mobile-bottom-nav subtree intercepts pointer events'

dm_back_btn_works.details: Back button returns to inbox correctly

action_items: FIX HIGH PRIORITY: Mobile bottom nav covers dm-input - add pb-20 (80px) to dm-thread on mobile OR hide mobile-bottom-nav on messages thread view
Code location: /app/frontend/src/pages/MessagesPage.js line 161 - change 'pb-4' to 'pb-4 md:pb-4 pb-20' or add conditional class when viewport < md
critical_code_review_comments: Bug: dm-thread has pb-4 but mobile-bottom-nav is h-16 (64px) - input gets covered
Mobile nav uses fixed positioning with z-100, dm-thread content needs to account for this 64px + safe-area-inset

success_rate.frontend: 77% (7/9 tests passed - 2 failures due to mobile nav overlap bug)

context_for_next_testing_agent: BLOCK-314 visualViewport fix is working correctly - dm-thread height adjusts dynamically. However, there's a separate mobile nav overlay bug: the fixed mobile-bottom-nav (64px) covers the dm-input. Fix needed: add bottom padding to dm-thread to account for mobile nav height.
rca_of_the_issue: BLOCK-314 fix (visualViewport) is working. Separate bug: MessagesPage.js line 161 has 'pb-4' (16px padding bottom) but mobile-bottom-nav in Navbar.js is h-16 (64px) fixed at bottom with z-100. The 16px padding is insufficient - need at least 80px padding on mobile to clear the nav bar.
